name: Nuxeo Content Services Platform REST API
what_it_does: Nuxeo content services platform REST API for media companies, financial services, manufacturing, and retail enterprises to manage digital assets, documents, rich media, and content workflows — enabling automated content ingestion, metadata management, rendition generation, lifecycle management, and intelligent content processing through Nuxeo's cloud-native content services platform (now Hyland). Enables AI agents to manage document creation for content repository automation, handle metadata for intelligent tagging and classification automation, access rendition for image and video format conversion automation, retrieve search for full-text and metadata content discovery automation, manage workflow for content approval and lifecycle automation, handle versioning for document revision and audit trail automation, access audit for content access and change logging automation, retrieve folder for content hierarchy and organization automation, manage permission for access control and sharing automation, and integrate Nuxeo with ERP, PIM, DAM, and creative tools for enterprise content operations automation.
use_cases: Managing digital asset library with metadata, renditions, and rights for media company automation agents
Automating document workflows and approvals for financial services content management automation agents
Integrating product content and digital assets with e-commerce platforms for retail automation agents
Processing and cataloging engineering documents and technical drawings for manufacturing automation agents
not_for: Simple file storage without workflow (Nuxeo is enterprise content management with workflow, not S3 replacement)
Consumer file sharing (Nuxeo is enterprise ECM/DAM, not consumer cloud storage)
Real-time collaborative editing (Nuxeo manages documents, not real-time co-authoring like Google Docs)
best_when: A media company, financial institution, or enterprise wanting AI agents to manage digital assets, automate content workflows, handle document versioning, and integrate content services with business systems through Nuxeo's (Hyland) cloud-native content platform.
avoid_when: HYLAND ACQUISITION CHANGES ROADMAP: Nuxeo was acquired by Hyland in 2021; automated independent Nuxeo product assumption creates roadmap uncertainty as Hyland integrates product portfolios; automated should verify Nuxeo vs. Hyland consolidated product strategy. NUXEO SCHEMA IS CUSTOMIZABLE: Nuxeo document types and schemas are configurable per deployment; automated generic-schema assumption creates schema_not_found for custom document types; automated must understand each deployment's content model. BLOB STORAGE IS SEPARATE: Nuxeo stores binary content in external blob storage (S3, Azure, GCS); automated inline content assumption creates streaming_required for binary document content; automated must implement external blob URL retrieval for content access. AUTOMATION CHAINS ARE SERVER-SIDE: Nuxeo automation chains run server-side JavaScript; automated client-side business logic assumption creates performance issues for complex content operations; automated should implement business logic in Nuxeo server-side operations.

auth.notes: Nuxeo uses Basic Auth + OAuth2 + token for content REST API. REST API with JSON. Paris, France (acquired by Hyland, Westlake OH 2021). Founded 2000. Products: Content Services Platform, Digital Asset Management, Intelligent Document Processing, Process Automation. SDKs: JS, Python, Java, iOS, Android. Open-source core. Cloud-native. Now part of Hyland portfolio alongside OnBase. Competes with OpenText and M-Files for enterprise content management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Community edition available open-source; cloud trial for enterprise evaluation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual cloud subscription; enterprise license; implementation services; support tiers
pricing.notes: Paris FR / Westlake OH. Hyland subsidiary. Open-source community + enterprise cloud. ECM/DAM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; bulk content and search APIs throttled per tier

known_agent_gotchas: NUXEO PATH IS DOCUMENT IDENTIFIER: Nuxeo uses repository path (e.g., /default-domain/workspaces/my-doc) as primary document identifier; automated ID-only assumption creates path_resolution_required for hierarchical content navigation; automated must understand Nuxeo path structure

DOCUMENT TYPES HAVE SCHEMAS: Each Nuxeo document type has specific schemas (dublincore, file, picture, etc.); automated generic-document assumption creates schema_not_found for type-specific metadata; automated must know target document type and its schemas

BULK OPERATIONS ARE ASYNC: Nuxeo bulk actions (bulk update, reindexing) are async operations; automated synchronous bulk assumption creates operation_in_progress; automated must implement Nuxeo bulk action polling for completion

RENDITIONS REQUIRE CONFIGURATION: Nuxeo rendition generation (thumbnails, PDF preview, video transcoding) requires server-side rendition configuration; automated instant rendition assumption creates no_rendition_available for unconfigured formats; automated must verify rendition availability per content type

ELASTICSEARCH INDEX LAG: Nuxeo full-text search uses Elasticsearch with indexing lag; automated immediately-searchable assumption creates search_not_found for recently created documents; automated must handle Elasticsearch indexing delay for search-after-create workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise content management. GDPR, SOC2, ISO-27001. OAuth2/Basic. US/EU. Content, document, and metadata.

security_score_components.security_notes: ECM/DAM. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Content and document data.
